location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Staff email: Epstein plans island stay March 26-28 with potential meeting with USVI Gov. Kenneth Mapp
Epstein personally approved funding for Joscha Bach to attend Science of Consciousness Conference in Tucson
Staff email confirms Epstein invited Deepak Chopra to join his March 25, 2018 Harvard visit.
